posts.author: ron.victor (Ronald G. Victor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Description

Its painful to have to manually reorder labels in a field if I add one later that is out of alpha order

What are you trying to achieve

Scenario
I define Package A has having features apple, blueberries, orange (alpha order).
I come back later and add a feature named carrot; Carrot now is not in alpha order.
I now have to delete orange, to add carrot and then readd orange.

Picture doing this for multiple packages with multiple features in each.
